en: The Town Hall was the heart of Ashvale. Rebuild it
Speak to the Caretaker about the Town Hall
Deliver the wood to the Caretaker
The Blacksmith won't ask for help. Give it anyway.
Deliver the wood to the Blacksmith
Deliver the coal to the Blacksmith
Deliver the iron to the Blacksmith
The Witch's workshop is where she lives and works and watches. Help her take it back.
Deliver the wood to the Witch
Deliver the stone to the Witch
Deliver the green slime cubes to the Witch
The Witch has given you a crafting table. Find a good spot for it in town.
Place the crafting table in town
